pred_reason: The contract uses external calls via Address.sendValue without proper state updates, indicating potential reentrancy risks (SWC-107). Arithmetic operations lack SafeMath protection, creating integer overflow/underflow vulnerabilities (SWC-101). Evidence: External calls via Address.sendValue found before state updates; SafeMath library not applied to all arithmetic operations; No traditional reentrancy guards despite external value transfers
